case.focal_claim: … [the study] finds substantially higher income for low-caste households residing in villages dominated by BACs [compared to villages dominated by upper caste].

execution_overview.overall_summary: Executed both planned mixed-effects analyses in Python. Task1 base model shows a positive, significant association of domlow with log income; the full-controls model is positive but not significant. Task2 base model is positive and marginally significant; the interaction-heavy model is not significant and shows mixed direction. Overall, results are inconclusive regarding substantially higher income in low-caste dominated villages.

deviations.description: Added on-the-fly pip installation (statsmodels, numpy, pandas, scipy, pyreadstat) inside the Python entry script due to ModuleNotFoundError within the container.
deviations.reason: Docker container environment did not have statsmodels available at runtime for the non-root user path.

deviations.description: Adjusted sys.path to include user site-packages to ensure imports succeed after --user pip install.
deviations.reason: Packages installed to user site were not on sys.path.

method_fidelity.fidelity_note: Followed the planned multilevel path on log(totinc) with domlow and full controls; only dependency/runtime fixes were made.

test_statistics.other: Full-controls model reported; base model coef=0.296, p=0.0119

result_raw.result_text: In the full-controls multilevel model, domlow has a positive but non-significant association with log household income.

conclusion.conclusion_text: Results are positive in direction but not statistically significant once full controls are included; evidence for substantially higher income is inconclusive.

deviations.description: Added on-the-fly pip installation of required Python packages inside the script to resolve ModuleNotFoundError.
deviations.reason: statsmodels not found in container at runtime.

method_fidelity.fidelity_note: Followed the planned path excluding prohibited controls; executed base model and allowed-controls-with-interactions model as specified.

test_statistics.other: Interaction-heavy model coef_domlow=-0.217, p=0.235 (note: main effect interpretation changes with interactions)

result_raw.result_text: In the base multilevel model (allowed controls excluded), domlow shows a positive, marginally non-significant association with log household income.

conclusion.conclusion_text: Evidence is suggestive but not definitive; the base model is positive and marginally significant while the interaction model is non-significant, yielding an overall inconclusive result.
